beats.narration: Right now, sitting perfectly still, you feel like nothing around you is moving. That stillness is the greatest illusion of your life.
beats.understand: YOU, apparently motionless — establish calm stillness before the hidden-motion reveal

footage.intent: a calm, serene, apparently motionless view of Earth from orbit

beats.narration: We think we know what fast is. A sprinter, forty-four. A jet, nine hundred. A bullet, three thousand four hundred kilometers an hour.
beats.understand: anchor everyday 'fast' so the reveal later dwarfs it

beats.narration: But the ground beneath your feet is not still. The Earth spins at sixteen hundred and seventy kilometers an hour — half the speed of that bullet, and you never feel it.
beats.understand: the ground you stand on is itself moving faster than a bullet

footage.intent: Earth's night surface and city lights drifting past beneath the camera

beats.narration: Now pull back, and watch what our whole planet is really doing.
beats.understand: zoom out from the spin to the orbit

beats.narration: Earth is falling around the Sun at a hundred and seven thousand kilometers an hour. Thirty kilometers every single second.

footage.intent: the whole Earth from orbit — a distinct daylight view from the spin's night side

beats.narration: And the Sun itself is not still. It drags us around the galaxy at eight hundred and twenty-eight thousand kilometers an hour.
beats.understand: the headline number — our galactic speed — on the galaxy itself (the galaxy cannot be filmed from inside it: designed 2D, tier C)

beats.narration: A tiny world, riding a star, around a galaxy that is itself racing through the universe.
beats.understand: our smallness / the scale of the galaxy

beats.narration: You have never been still. Not for one single second of your life.
beats.understand: THE thesis lands over the calm Earth from the opening, reinterpreted (intentional callback); the film ENDS here

footage.intent: return to the calm Earth of the opening — the payoff lands on the strongest image (callback)
